description: Initial screen state showing screen sharing instructions and participant video.
frame_description: A dark screen with white text providing instructions on how to start the session by sharing the window.

description: Task instructions are displayed on the screen.
frame_description: The screen displays the full text of the user testing task.

description: 'Open' button becomes visible.
frame_description: An 'Open' button appears below the task instructions.

description: User clicks the 'Open' button.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Open' button at the moment of the click.

description: Navigation to Google homepage.
frame_description: The screen transitions from the instruction page to the Google homepage.

description: Google homepage is fully rendered.
frame_description: The Google search page is fully loaded with the search bar and logo visible.

description: Instruction overlay reappears.
frame_description: The task instruction overlay covers the Google homepage.

description: User hovers over 'Repeat the task instructions' button.
frame_description: The cursor lingers over the 'Repeat the task instructions' button.

description: Instruction text changes to a thinking prompt.
frame_description: The overlay text changes to 'What are you thinking right now?'.

description: User types a response into the feedback prompt, describing a travel scenario from Sunshine Coast to London.
interaction_target: What are you thinking right now?
frame_description: A dark overlay with a text prompt and an 'Open' button is visible over a blurred background.

description: Instruction text reverts to full task description.
frame_description: The overlay text returns to the original task description.

description: Navigation to the Google homepage.
frame_description: The Google search homepage is displayed.

description: Google homepage is revealed as the overlay disappears.
frame_description: The Google homepage is visible again as the overlay is removed.

description: Cursor hovers over the Google search bar.
User types 'skyscanner' into the search bar.
frame_description: The user is typing in the Google search bar, and autocomplete suggestions are beginning to appear.

description: Google search results for 'skyscanner' are displayed.
frame_description: The search results page is fully rendered, showing Skyscanner as the top result.

description: Cursor hovers over the Skyscanner search result link.
interaction_target: Skyscanner | Find the cheapest flights fast

description: User clicks on the Skyscanner search result.
interaction_target: Skyscanner | Find the cheapest flights fast

description: Navigation to the Skyscanner homepage.
page_title: Skyscanner | Find the cheapest flights fast
frame_description: The Skyscanner homepage is loading.

description: Skyscanner loading screen with logo spinner is visible.
frame_description: A dark blue screen with a white Skyscanner logo spinner in the center.

description: Task prompt overlay appears with updated instructions.
frame_description: A dark overlay with a long text prompt is visible over the Skyscanner homepage.

description: User types the first part of a detailed response into the feedback prompt.
interaction_target: What are you thinking right now?
frame_description: The user is typing a long paragraph into the text area on the overlay.

description: The feedback overlay disappears, showing the Skyscanner homepage.
frame_description: The Skyscanner homepage is now fully visible and interactive.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'From' location input field.
Click on the origin input field
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'From' input field on the Skyscanner homepage.

description: Type 'sunsh' into the origin field
frame_description: The text 'sunsh' appears in the 'From' input field.

description: Autocomplete dropdown appears for the origin field
frame_description: A dropdown menu with airport suggestions like 'Sunshine Coast (MCY)' is visible below the origin field.

description: Select 'Sunshine Coast (MCY)' from the dropdown
frame_description: The cursor clicks on the 'Sunshine Coast (MCY)' option in the autocomplete list.

description: Task instruction overlay appears and then disappears
frame_description: A dark overlay with the text 'Yes, please think aloud as you go. What are you looking at right now?' covers the screen.

description: Click on the destination input field
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'To' input field.

description: Type 'london' into the destination field
frame_description: The text 'london' is entered into the 'To' input field.

description: Autocomplete dropdown appears for the destination field
frame_description: A dropdown menu with options like 'London (Any)' and specific London airports appears.

description: Select 'London (Any)' from the dropdown
frame_description: The cursor clicks on the 'London (Any)' option in the autocomplete list.

description: Click the 'Search' button
frame_description: The cursor clicks the blue 'Search' button on the right side of the search bar.

description: Loading spinner appears
frame_description: A small loading spinner is visible in the center of the screen.

description: Navigate to the flight search results page
frame_description: The page layout changes to the search results view with filters on the left and flight cards in the center.

description: Flight search results load and populate the page
frame_description: Flight cards with airline logos, times, and prices appear on the page.

description: Scroll down through the flight results
frame_description: The page content moves vertically as the user scrolls down.

description: Scroll back up to the top of the results
frame_description: The page content moves vertically as the user scrolls back up.

description: Click 'Select' on the first flight result
frame_description: The cursor clicks the 'Select' button on the Virgin Australia flight card.

description: Flight card expands to show details
frame_description: The selected flight card expands, revealing more information about the flight legs and booking providers.

description: Scroll down further through the results
frame_description: The page content moves vertically as the user scrolls down past the expanded flight card.

description: Click on the 'Select' button for the first flight result.
frame_description: Skyscanner flight results page with the first flight result highlighted.

description: The flight details section expands to show more information.
frame_description: The flight details section is expanding below the first flight result.

description: Click on the 'Select' button for a different flight result.
frame_description: Skyscanner flight results page with a different flight result highlighted.

description: The flight details section for the second flight expands.
frame_description: The flight details section is expanding below the selected flight result.

description: Scroll up the flight results page.
frame_description: The page content is moving downwards as the user scrolls up.

description: Click on the '2+ stops' filter checkbox.
frame_description: Skyscanner flight results page with the sidebar filters visible.

description: A 'Searching...' loading overlay appears.
frame_description: A white overlay with a loading spinner and the text 'Searching...' is visible over the results.

description: The results update to show no flights matching the filter.
frame_description: The results area shows a message stating that no flights match the filters.

description: Uncheck the '2+ stops' filter checkbox.
frame_description: Skyscanner flight results page with the '2+ stops' filter checked.

description: The flight results are restored after removing the filter.
frame_description: The original list of flight results is visible again.

description: Scroll down the flight results page.
frame_description: The page content is moving upwards as the user scrolls down.

description: Scroll up the flight results page.
frame_description: The page content is moving downwards as the user scrolls up.

description: Click on the 'New Tab' button.
frame_description: Browser tab bar with the 'New Tab' button highlighted.

description: Navigate to a new tab (Google search page).
frame_description: A new browser tab opens and loads the Google search page.

description: Click on the Trello bookmark.
frame_description: Browser bookmarks bar with the Trello bookmark highlighted.

description: Navigate to the Trello boards page.
frame_description: The browser loads the Trello boards page.

description: The Trello workspace content loads.
frame_description: The Trello boards page is fully loaded and visible.

description: A cookie consent banner appears.
frame_description: A banner at the top of the page informs the user about cookie usage.

description: Click on the 'Japan' board card.
frame_description: Trello boards page with the 'Japan' board card highlighted.

description: Navigate to the 'Japan' Trello board.
frame_description: The browser loads the 'Japan' Trello board page.

description: The Japan board content loads.
frame_description: The 'Japan' Trello board is fully loaded with lists and cards.

description: Scroll horizontally to the right on the Trello board.
frame_description: The board content is moving to the left as the user scrolls right.

description: Navigation from the Trello board to the Google New Tab page.
frame_description: The Trello board 'Japan' is visible with several lists and cards.

description: Click on the Skyscanner browser tab.
interaction_target: Skyscanner | Find the cheapest flights fast
frame_description: Browser tab bar with the Skyscanner tab highlighted.

description: Navigation from the Google New Tab page to the Booking.com homepage.
frame_description: The Google New Tab page is visible with search bar and shortcuts.

description: Click on the Booking.com bookmark.
frame_description: Browser bookmarks bar with the Booking.com bookmark highlighted.

description: A 'Genius' sign-in modal appears on the Booking.com homepage.
page_title: Booking.com | Official site | The best hotels, flights, car rentals & accommodations.
frame_description: The Booking.com homepage is visible with a large blue header and a sign-in modal in the center.

description: The sign-in modal closes.
frame_description: The Booking.com homepage is now fully visible without the modal overlay.

description: User clicks on the destination input field.
User types 'London' into the destination search field.
frame_description: The destination input field shows the text 'London' being typed.

description: Destination suggestions dropdown appears.
frame_description: A dropdown list of locations starting with 'London' is visible below the search bar.

description: User selects 'London, Greater London, United Kingdom' from the suggestions.
User clicks the 'Search' button.
Navigation to the search results page for London.
page_title: Booking.com : Hotels in London. Search results.
frame_description: The page transitions from the homepage to a list of hotel search results for London.

description: User scrolls down through the hotel search results.
frame_description: The user is scrolling through a list of hotel cards on the search results page.

description: User clicks the 'Sign in' button in the header.
User scrolls further down the search results.
frame_description: More hotel listings are revealed as the user scrolls down.

description: The page layout shifts slightly as content finishes rendering.
frame_description: The search results list adjusts its layout slightly.

description: User continues scrolling through the hotel listings.
frame_description: The user is browsing through various hotel cards like 'Arriva Hotel' and 'The Warwick By Nestor'.

description: User scrolls down to view more hotels.
frame_description: The user scrolls past 'The Mayfair Townhouse' and 'The Lodge Hotel - Putney'.

description: User hovers over the 'Deluxe Two-Bedroom Vauxhall Apartment' listing.
